criteria.description: stardust:extract --prep runs unchanged and produces the standard stardust/current/ artifacts (pages/*.json, screenshots, brand extraction, descriptive PRODUCT/DESIGN specs); no extract file or behavior is modified.

The target spec at the project root is a verbatim promotion of stardust/current/{PRODUCT,DESIGN}.{md,json}; stardust/direction.md records preserve mode; stardust:direct is never invoked and no divergence/palette/type re-selection occurs.

stardust/replica/inconsistency-register.md exists; it is empty when no findings are supplied, and any entry carries captured evidence, the minimal change, and a status (applied/deferred). No design delta appears in the prototype without a register entry.

Archetype prototypes are clean re-authored HTML/CSS: semantic structure, tokenized CSS with values traceable to the source site's own stylesheets, no copied DOM/class-soup/framework artifacts, content verbatim from the captured page JSON.

The source-fidelity gate runs all three probes (content-diff and visual-diff with --profile generic against the live URL, plus stitch-shot + pixel-compare) and its evidence (per-iteration metrics, band breakdown, height delta, diff images) is written under stardust/replica/.
The gate runs at both 1440 and 360; mobile results are recorded, not assumed from desktop.
At most 3 measured iterations per breakpoint; unresolved deltas are logged as residuals rather than silently accepted or endlessly iterated.
Fonts are loaded from the same public source or substituted with a metric-matched free face; no commercial/licensed kit is rehosted; the brand family stays first in the font stack.
Archetypes land at stardust/prototypes/<slug>-proposed.html and page lifecycle lives in core state.json, so migrate/deploy/rollout consume them without modification.
Captured artifacts carry live-render provenance; no synthesized content or invented sections appear anywhere in the recreation.
